title: South Africa on the brink of T20 World Cup triumph
description: CRICKET NEWS - The past few days have been a...
bodyText:
CRICKET NEWS - The past few days have been a time of excitement for South African cricket fans.


> The Proteas secured a narrow victory on Monday by defeating the West Indies in the morning, thereby securing their spot in the T20 World Cup semi-finals.


Afghanistan won a low-scoring match against Bangladesh. The game on Thursday morning (02:30 South African time) against Afghanistan, which is ranked five places below the Proteas in the T20 world rankings, could be seen as advantageous for the Proteas.

If they beat Afghanistan, the Proteas could face either India or England in the final leg of the tournament on Saturday.

Either way, we as South Africans stand proudly behind our team, and this T20 World Cup will definitely go down in history.

Do you believe the Proteas will secure a win for South Africa?

‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’
